title: Final review of epic idc diff
description: Orchestrator meta-tick: review the epic's full diff (git diff epic-base...HEAD, base branch from tk show idc) for correctness, spec compliance against each child tick, and agent-drift patterns (suppressed errors, copy-paste variants, defensive bloat, stray TODO/HACK). Resolve or route findings before close-out. Owned by the orchestrator - not dispatched to an implementer subagent.
closed_reason: Completed: most-capable-tier review over full epic diff — 0 blockers, 4 should-fix (all fixed and re-merged: re-claim guard, replication-path write restoration, manual-epic roadmap gating, actor description accuracy), 5 nits (3 fixed: stale started_at on reopen, dead test helper, doc qualification; 2 accepted pre-existing: per-card timer, dead catch). All six ticks spec-compliant.
